items.title: AI Product Manager | Good Career in 2026?
items.author: codebasics
items.summary:
In this video you will clearly understand what is AI product manager role, its career growth opportunities and the skills required to become one. This video contains insights from a combination of market research from published articles, real experiences from experts in the field and views from Codebasics.

Here is the link to all resources shown in the video: https://resources.codebasics.io/xbLL2s

Check out our AI Product Manager Bootcamp: https://codebasics.io/lp/bootcamp/live-ai-product-manager-bootcamp

Wondering if AI PM is right for you?
 
Take our free 60-second suitability test and get an honest readiness score: https://resources.codebasics.io/i8PNz3

Meet the panel:

Priyanka Mishra: https://www.linkedin.com/in/priyanka-mishra-a9769aa2/
Karandeep Singh Grover: https://www.linkedin.com/in/groverkds/
Aakash Pardeshi: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vantageaakash/

items.title: This AI Agent Handles Your Invoices End to End
items.author: codebasics
items.summary:
Most AI tutorials give you toy projects.
This one is production ready.
 
We built an Invoice Processing AI Agent that any business can actually use.
It reads invoices, talks to Gmail, Slack, and QuickBooks - all automated.
 
We tested two approaches:
☑️ Claude Code's built-in connectors
☑️ Zapier's MCP server (8000+ integrations)
 
Full video tutorial link - https://youtu.be/QBI5bmbgL38?si=vuWevh44quMgC8BV
Try Zapier SDK - https://bit.ly/4wYrgCJ
 
#AI #AIAgent #ClaudeCode #Zapier #InvoiceAutomation #codebasics #short

ABOUT CONFLUENT DEVELOPER
Confluent Developer provides comprehensive resources for developers looking to learn about Apache Kafka®, Apache Flink®, Confluent Cloud, Confluent Platform, and any other technology related to the broader Data Streaming Platform. Content on Confluent Developer includes courses, getting started guides, topical deep-dives, patterns, tutorials, and listings of community events. Learn more at https://developer.confluent.io.
